info.title: SDKWork Order Backend API
info.description: Backend/admin contract for SDKWork commerce order governance, lifecycle operations, and payment settlement replay.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Order admin read, lifecycle commands, and payment settlement replay.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search across order identifiers and subject.

get.summary: Retrieve order detail for operator review

post.summary: Cancel an order from the admin surface
Close an order from the admin surface
Manually confirm payment and run order settlement saga

get.summary: List after-sales requests for operator review
Retrieve after-sales request for operator review

AuthToken.description: SDKWork auth token carried as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md section 15.3.

WriteCommandIdempotencyKey.name: Idempotency-Key
WriteCommandIdempotencyKey.description: Optional client retry key scoped by tenant, principal, method, and path. The server generates a unique key when omitted.
